rationale: The citing paper explicitly manipulates and analyzes product type as hedonic vs. utilitarian in Study 2 (2×2×2 design), so a classic JMR/JMKR source on hedonic–utilitarian choice is plausibly being used as a construct/theory foundation rather than a casual mention. The cited paper’s core contribution is precisely consumer trade-offs between hedonic and utilitarian goods, which aligns directly with that element of the citing study design.
